response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an exceptionally experienced and skilled developer, far exceeding the seniority level of this role. While his technical expertise aligns well with the required skills (TypeScript, React, databases, etc.), his extensive background at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) and leadership experience suggest he may not be the right fit for a junior/mid-level individual contributor position in a niche industry like renewable energy/construction tech. However, his open-source contributions and diverse project experience warrant a conversation to explore potential alignment or alternative opportunities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
Proven track record at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with impactful contributions to large-scale systems.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating passion for clean architecture and collaboration.
concerns: Overqualified for the role; may lack long-term motivation or growth potential in a junior/mid-level position.
Industry mismatch: primarily worked in tech giants (ad tech, social media) rather than renewable energy/construction tech.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his senior-level flexibility expectations.
